The rider standing sideways relative to the direction of travel
Carved lines in the snow showing the 'toe' and 'heel' edge turns
The snowboarder wearing a helmet, tinted goggles, and baggy winter gear
Powdered snow 'spraying' outward as the board cuts through a turn
Washing dishes: A kitchen sink filled with warm water and white soap bubbles
Porcelain plates and glass cups submerged or being scrubbed
A person using a yellow-and-green sponge or a bristled dish brush
Clean, wet dishes resting in a wire or plastic drying rack
Rubber gloves protecting the hands from hot, soapy water
Elliptical trainer: A person standing on two large, flat footplates in a gliding motion
Long, vertical handlebars being pushed and pulled by the arms
The feet moving in a smooth, oval-shaped (elliptical) path
A front or rear-mounted flywheel enclosed in a plastic housing
A digital console displaying resistance level, time, and calories burned
